items.name_en: B's latest bucket bag, made of cotton twill. Crafted in an Italian workshop, adorned with jacquard B's exclusive check pattern. Unlined design, lightweight. Features smooth calfskin trim and an adjustable shoulder strap, allowing you to switch between shoulder and crossbody styles. A must-have style. 17.5 x 10.5 x 20cm

items.name_en: B's new medium woven cardholder is an essential everyday item. Made of cowhide with a smooth texture. It has 6 card slots and a middle compartment for cash. Lightweight and compact, perfect for small bags. Available in many colors. Dimensions: 11 x 7.5 cm

items.name_en: Baguette Handbag
items.name_cn:
Baguette Handbag
Color leather handbag
More details
Iconic Baguette Mini handbag, Nappa soft leather material, featuring 3D textured FF pattern. Adorned with FF buckle. Features front flap, magnetic closure, lined interior compartment, pocket, and gold metal hardware. Handbag comes with removable handle and chain shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder carry, or crossbody
Material:Outer: Sheepskin, Lining: Cotton
Depth:4
Length:19
Height:11.5
Model:0191S

items.name_cn:
Balenciaga
GHW Black S/23cm Available
Balenciaga Hourglass Bag
Bought over 10 ZP samples for development❗️
All details can be compared across versions⚠️
Market quality varies
Some don't stand straight, some surfaces aren't flat
One color matches several hardware colors
It's dizzying to look at, won't say much else
Developed for so long, just want to make the most accurate version

S:23×15×10cm #593546

items.name_en: Balenciaga | Hourglass bag has a new look again! !
items.name_cn:
Balenciaga | Hourglass bag has a new look again! !
From Balenciaga 22 Fall/Winter series - Crush Handbag
The powerful, practical large bag is back!
Breaking the traditional stiff bag shape, it features stitched soft calfskin paired with a rugged metal slider chain strap, allowing you to freely switch between single shoulder and crossbody styles. A casual and atmospheric vibe!
Large 32cm Small 26cm

specs.rawTitle:
Balenciaga | Hourglass bag has a new look again! !
From Balenciaga 22 Fall/Winter series - Crush Handbag
The powerful, practical large bag is back!
Breaking the traditional stiff bag shape, it features stitched soft calfskin paired with a rugged metal slider chain strap, allowing you to freely switch between single shoulder and crossbody styles. A casual and atmospheric vibe!
Large 32cm Small 26cm

items.name_en: Balenciaga Crush Hourglass Chain Bag 🛍
items.name_cn:
Balenciaga Crush Hourglass Chain Bag 🛍
The latest Crush pleated chain bag is here! Paying tribute to the classic, the unique arc shape is highly recognizable and eye-catching.
Breaking the traditional stiff silhouette, it features soft leather, multiple compartments, and large capacity. The shoulder strap is switchable for shoulder or crossbody, offering a casual and stylish look.
Unisex and trendy, versatile.
Model: 8915
Small Size: 31x20x10cm
Large Size: 40x25x13cm

items.name_en: Balenciaga Paris crush chain bag ⛓️ Classic hourglass silhouette but soft like a pillow, crumpled and unfolded vintage origami texture, timeless and versatile. The crush bag reinterprets the classic with deconstruction techniques, continuing the arched base and pointed edge design, removing handles, keeping the B buckle. Can loop the chain through the ring to fold as a handbag or clutch, or adjust to a single chain for shoulder or crossbody, one bag has four ways to wear. Model: 8911. Size: 39.9*24.9*13.0
items.name_cn: Balenciaga Paris crush chain bag ⛓️ Classic hourglass silhouette but soft like a pillow, crumpled and unfolded vintage origami texture, timeless and versatile. The crush bag reinterprets the classic with deconstruction techniques, continuing the arched base and pointed edge design, removing handles, keeping the B buckle. Can loop the chain through the ring to fold as a handbag or clutch, or adjust to a single chain for shoulder or crossbody, one bag has four ways to wear. Model: 8911. Size: 39.9*24.9*13.0

items.name_en: Balenciaga's key Hourglass bag for this season. The unique, iconic curved silhouette is highly recognizable and eye-catching. It features a smooth, flat surface with a crescent moon shape and a metal B-shaped pull tab. The embossed cowhide texture is stylish and chic. Size: 25.5x6x16cm Model No: 8084
